title: cardanthera balsamica var. thymus
intro: Cardanthera balsamica var. thymus, also known as the alpine balsam, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally used for its medicinal properties, the plant has been known to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cardanthera balsamica var. thymus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
